sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel documentation available for NES platformer

special_mechanics.name: Side-scrolling Platforming (Haunted Mansion stage)
special_mechanics.description: Player defeats ghosts by throwing candles; basic horizontal movement with jumping required to navigate level

special_mechanics.name: Side-scrolling Action (Pirates of the Caribbean stage)
special_mechanics.description: Player must rescue villagers from pirates; involves platforming and combat encounters

tier_notes: Tier 3: No quantitative physics data available in sources. Game reviewed as having 'terrible collision detection' per Total! magazine. Multiple game modes (side-scrolling, vehicle stages, first-person) suggest varying movement mechanics per stage, but specific parameters undocumented.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Adventures in the Magic Kingdom debug/development documentation
Wikipedia - Adventures in the Magic Kingdom gameplay and reception
